text.content: The MT170 Mini-Ex makes an excellent general purpose solution with a versatile tread pattern adaptable to multiple surface conditions. Engineered to perform in various types of terrains, the MT170 contains a cut and tear-resistant compound and heavy-duty carcass, providing maximum stability and durability.
